name: AMM Memory
description: Durable memory substrate for OpenClaw agents via amm. Claims the memory slot to provide memory_search/memory_get tools, injects ambient recall before each LLM call, and captures conversation events.

ammBin.description: Path to the local amm binary. Defaults to 'amm' on PATH.

dbPath.description: Path to the amm SQLite database (binary mode only). Defaults to ~/.amm/amm.db.

apiUrl.description: Base URL for the AMM HTTP API. When set, the plugin uses HTTP transport instead of the local binary.

apiKey.description: Bearer token for AMM HTTP API authentication.

projectId.description: Stable project identifier for scoped recall. Also settable via AMM_PROJECT_ID env.

recallLimit.description: Maximum number of recall items to inject per turn.
